title: Data Structures & Python Programming (JNTUK R20)
description: JNTUK R20 Year 1 Sem 2 — Python programming fundamentals combined with core data structures (arrays, linked lists, stacks, queues, trees). Fully aligned to JNTUK B.Tech CSE R20 syllabus.

modules.title: Getting Started
modules.description: Introduction and overview of Data Structures & Python Programming (JNTUK R20)

pages.title: Data Structures & Python — Course Overview
Data Structures & Python — Wiki Index

modules.title: Core Lectures
modules.description: All lectures and concept pages for this course

pages.title: Python Basics: Data Types, Variables, Operators, and Input/Output
Python Control Flow: if-elif-else, for, while, break, continue
Python Functions: def, Arguments, *args, **kwargs, Lambda, Recursion
Python Lists and Tuples: Indexing, Slicing, Comprehensions, Methods
Python Dictionaries and Sets: CRUD Operations, Comprehensions, Counter
Python OOP: Classes, Objects, Inheritance, Polymorphism, Dunder Methods
Python Modules and File Handling: import, os, csv, json
Arrays in Python: NumPy Arrays, 2D Arrays, Operations, and Complexity
Linked Lists: Singly, Doubly, Circular — Python Implementation
Stacks: LIFO Principle, Array and Linked List Implementation, Applications
Queues: FIFO, Circular Queue, Deque, Priority Queue in Python
Trees: Binary Trees, BST, Traversals — Python Implementation
Sorting and Searching: Bubble, Insertion, Selection, Binary Search
